text: Perform a complete legal analysis of a vendor, service, or commercial dispute. Identify the parties, business relationship, scope of work or arrangement, payment issues, delay or non-performance events, possible breach points, legal and contractual issues that can be inferred, likely obligations of each side, notice-related issues, possible liability exposure, compliance concerns, evidence gaps, likely defenses, probable outcome, and the strongest settlement or litigation path. If terms such as limitation of liability, indemnity, governing law, or dispute resolution are not clearly available, say so explicitly and explain the impact. Also state what should be prepared next for notice, negoti
